login.hero_subtitle: A system for OMS operations support.
login.hero_forgot_detail: If you’ve lost your password, ask a user with the ADMIN role to reset it for you.
login.hero_tip_account: Please sign in with your work account.
login.hero_tip_session: For security, your session may expire after a period of inactivity.
login.error_default: An error occurred while signing in.
login.backend_notice: Enter your credentials to sign in.
login.second_factor_hint: Enter the verification code sent to your registered email.

admin_password_reset.title: Reset user password
admin_password_reset.description: Enter the user’s login ID to issue a temporary password. Deliver it only through a secure channel. (ADMIN only.)
admin_password_reset.result_title: Temporary password (cannot be shown again after you leave this page)
admin_password_reset.result_hint: Ask the user to change their password immediately after signing in.
admin_password_reset.error_default: Could not complete the request. Check permissions or the target user.
